Quality Education.reason: This course is a direct provision of tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops language skills relevant for cultural appreciation and employment (Targets 4.4, 4.7).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly promotes the rule of law (Target 16.3) by instructing students to 'Respect Copyright' and intellectual property rights.
